spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates cards scaling smoothly and dynamically using zoom and opacity.

interactive.rationale: Requires natural scrolling interactions, complete with interactive buttons to add or reset cards.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with scroll zoom and viewport enter milestone specifications.

edge_cases.rationale: Successfully integrates IntersectionObserver thresholds and explains progressive fallback behavior.

references.rationale: Correctly references documentation through parent crumbs.

design_system.rationale: Maintains design system fidelity with proper button styling and variables.

summary: An engaging concept applying animatable zoom to viewport enters with IntersectionObserver, featuring active scrolling and layout controls.
